name: 39 · xArm Swap (compose pick + place)
description: Child SubWorkflow that swaps the occupant of an instrument port with a new sample from the rack, by composing the 37-pick and 38-place sub-templates. Four staged SubWorkflow calls: pick the occupant out of the port → place it in the temp rack slot → pick the new sample from the rack → place the new sample into the port. Pure composition: no ROS AutomatedStep of its own, it only wires Start.initial poses into the child pick/place templates and reports swapped=true at the End. Not directly runnable — consumed by 40-sample-handling.
